resources.string: Blocks Reels, Shorts, and other short-form feeds in social apps.

Reels Blocker uses accessibility to detect when you open short-form video feeds (Reels, Shorts, TikTok, Spotlight, etc.) in supported apps and blocks them based on your settings. No data leaves your device.
If Reels Blocker does not appear or cannot be turned on: open App info → ⋮ menu → Allow restricted settings, then try again.
